sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n74301" key="o)cuko/mina" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀξῠ-κόμινα</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τά</gen>, in Lat. form <sense id="n74301.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">oxycomina, olives served in brine</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">vinegar,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1026.tlg001:66:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Petron.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">66.7</biblScope> </bibl> (cf. <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">cominia,</tr_> pl. <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">a kind of olive,</tr_> Pallad.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Agric.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.18</biblScope></bibl>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">oximinum = aceto mixto cum cumino, Gloss.).</tr_> </sense> </entryFree>
